standard.rawManifest:
---
# Source: test-deep-nested/templates/values-display.yaml
all-values: |
    complex:
      name: complex-structure
      settings:
        cache:
          enabled: false
          ttl: 3600
        database:
          primary:
            credentials:
              password: secret
              username: admin
            host: primary-db
            port: 5432
          replicas:
          - host: replica1
            port: 5432
          - host: replica2
            port: 5432
    level1:
      level2:
        level3:
          level4:
            level5:
              deepest: overridden-deepest
              newKey: added-at-deepest
              value: l5-value
            value: l4-value
          value: l3-value
        value: l2-value
      value: l1-value
